title: AI Text-Improve in Web Owner Editor

tasks.title: Port useAiTextImprove SSE hook to web
tasks.description:
Create apps/web/src/hooks/useAiTextImprove.ts, a web-native port of apps/admin/src/features/accommodations/hooks/useAiTextImprove.ts. Consumes POST /api/v1/protected/ai/text-improve (SSE, text/event-stream) with native fetch + a manual SSE parser (no TanStack Query, no EventSource per admin's own approach — credentials:'include'). State machine: idle -> loading -> streaming -> done -> error. Accumulate 'token' events' delta into a running suggestion string; 'done' finalizes it; 'error' surfaces {code, message}. Must use AbortController and abort the in-flight request on unmount to avoid state updates after unmount. Request payload: { fieldValue: string, fieldType: 'description' | 'summary', locale?: 'es'|'en'|'pt' } per AiTextImproveRequestSchema.

Tests: apps/web/test/hooks/use-ai-text-improve.test.ts — AAA pattern. Cover: (1) state transitions idle->loading->streaming->done for a mocked SSE stream with multiple token events, (2) token deltas accumulate in order, (3) error event transitions to error state with code/message, (4) network/fetch rejection transitions to error state, (5) calling the returned abort/cleanup function (or unmounting) aborts the underlying fetch and no further state updates occur, (6) request body matches the schema shape for both fieldType values.

subtasks.title: Write unit tests for all state transitions + abort

tasks.title: Build AiTextImprovePanel presentational component
tasks.description:
Create apps/web/src/components/host/editor/AiTextImprovePanel.client.tsx + colocated AiTextImprovePanel.module.css, a web-native port of apps/admin/src/features/accommodations/components/AiTextImprovePanel.tsx. Props: current field value, fieldType ('description'|'summary'), onAccept(suggestion: string), onDiscard(). Internally uses the T-001 useAiTextImprove hook. Renders: trigger button (disabled while loading/streaming or when triggerDisabled prop is true) -> on click opens panel -> loading skeleton -> live-streaming text (append as tokens arrive) -> done state with Accept/Discard buttons (plain replace, no diff) -> error state with a Dismiss button. Use @repo/i18n for all copy (no hardcoded strings) and vanilla CSS Modules per apps/web styling convention (no Tailwind).

Tests: apps/web/test/components/host/editor/AiTextImprovePanel.rtl.test.tsx — AAA pattern with testing-library. Cover: (1) trigger button renders and is disabled when triggerDisabled or already streaming, (2) clicking trigger shows loading skeleton then streamed text as mocked hook state updates, (3) done state renders Accept + Discard, clicking Accept calls onAccept with the full suggestion text, (4) clicking Discard calls onDiscard and does not call onAccept, (5) error state renders the error message and a Dismiss action that resets the panel to closed without calling onAccept.

subtasks.title: Write component tests for all 4 states

tasks.title: Wire AI-improve button into the description field
tasks.description:
In apps/web/src/components/host/editor/BasicInfoSection.client.tsx, mount the T-002 AiTextImprovePanel for the `description` field, gated by PlanEntitlementGate (entitlementKey='ai_text_improve', using useMyEntitlements()). On Accept: (a) if the field is currently a plain textarea (not entitled to can_use_rich_description), replace the textarea value directly; (b) if rendered via RichTextEditor.client.tsx (TipTap, entitled to can_use_rich_description), write the suggestion into the TipTap instance using its markdown-set path (route it through the same markdown-parsing the editor uses on initial load — do not raw-insert unparsed markdown as literal text). Button is disabled when the field is empty (nothing to improve).

Tests: extend/add to the existing BasicInfoSection test suite. Cover: (1) button hidden when useMyEntitlements().has('ai_text_improve') is false, (2) button visible+enabled when entitled and field has content, (3) button disabled when field is empty, (4) Accept updates the plain-textarea description value when can_use_rich_description is false, (5) Accept updates the TipTap-rendered description (mock RichTextEditor's setter) when can_use_rich_description is true, (6) Discard leaves the original description value untouched in both rendering modes.

subtasks.title: Wire panel + entitlement gate for description
Handle Accept write-back for plain textarea path
Handle Accept write-back for TipTap path
Write tests for all entitlement/rendering combinations

tasks.title: Wire AI-improve button into the summary field
tasks.description:
In apps/web/src/components/host/editor/BasicInfoSection.client.tsx, mount the T-002 AiTextImprovePanel for the `summary` field (plain textarea only — no TipTap concern for this field), gated by the same PlanEntitlementGate (entitlementKey='ai_text_improve'). On Accept, replace the summary textarea's value directly. Button disabled when the field is empty.

Tests: extend the same BasicInfoSection test suite. Cover: (1) button hidden when not entitled, (2) button visible+enabled when entitled and field has content, (3) button disabled when field is empty, (4) Accept replaces the summary value, (5) Discard leaves the original summary value untouched.

subtasks.title: Wire panel + entitlement gate for summary

tasks.title: Verify quota/error surfacing and unmount-safety across both fields
tasks.description: Integration test pass across apps/web/test/components/host/editor/BasicInfoSection covering the cross-cutting acceptance criteria that span both description and summary once T-003 and T-004 are wired: (1) a mocked 403 ENTITLEMENT_REQUIRED response surfaces as a dismissible error in the panel instead of throwing, for both fields, (2) a mocked 403 LIMIT_REACHED response surfaces the same way, (3) a mocked network failure mid-stream surfaces the error state, (4) unmounting BasicInfoSection (e.g. simulating navigation away) while a stream is in-flight does not throw and does not call setState after unmount (assert no React act() warnings / no unhandled promise rejections). No new production code expected here unless a gap is found while writing these tests — if a gap is found (e.g. missing try/catch around the abort), fix it in the T-001/T-002 files.

subtasks.title: Test entitlement/limit error surfacing for both fields
Test unmount-mid-stream safety for both fields

tasks.title: Manual smoke pass across all 4 field-rendering combinations
tasks.description: In a local dev environment (wt:up in this worktree), manually verify the full matrix from the spec's Edge Cases section for a real owner-basico+ (or complex-basico+) test user: (1) description as plain textarea + AI button, (2) description as TipTap + AI button, (3) summary + AI button, (4) button hidden for a non-entitled user (e.g. a tourist-tier or owner without ai_text_improve). For each: trigger the button, confirm streaming renders, Accept replaces the value correctly (including TipTap markdown rendering after accept), Discard leaves the field untouched. No automated test — this is a manual QA checklist to note in the PR description per the project's billing/feature manual-smoke convention where applicable (not billing-gated here, but still a real API call).
